stem: Q = A OR B is a Boolean expression with two inputs A and B.
model_answer: OR is true when at least one input is true. Truth table: A=0 B=0 => Q=0; A=0 B=1 => Q=1; A=1 B=0 => Q=1; A=1 B=1 => Q=1.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the truth table for Q = A OR B.

mark_points.text: Q is 0 only when A = 0 AND B = 0
accepted_alternatives: output is 0 only when both inputs are 0

mark_points.text: Q is 1 in the other three rows (at least one input is 1)
accepted_alternatives: output is 1 if any input is 1
